It doesn't cleanly fit radio-picker (which uses radio dots, not checkboxes), list-with-status (which shows transaction history with status colors), or any single template. The layout combines item selection with inventory/price display and a final action CTA.

content.title: Earnings Payout Timeline
content.body:
1. SALE - You sell an item during your show
2. CONFIRMED - You review and confirm the order
3. SHIPPED - You ship the item via Correios
4. DELIVERED - The buyer receives the package
5. COMPLETED - The buyer confirms the item is correct
6. AVAILABLE - Your earnings appear in your wallet
7. PAID OUT - You withdraw to your bank via PIX

steps.description: You sell an item during your show
You review and confirm the order
You ship the item via Correios
The buyer confirms the item is correct
Your earnings appear in your wallet
You withdraw to your bank via PIX
